items.summary: Extend the backend order data model and actor to support full order lifecycle transitions: pending → processing → shipped → delivered → cancelled. Expose update endpoints so that order status can be changed programmatically, and persist all status changes in stable storage.

Implement end-to-end transaction processing in the backend: when a Stripe payment confirmation is received, atomically mark the associated order as #processing, record the confirmed payment details, and ensure the order cannot be double-confirmed.
Add a React Query hook (useUpdateOrderStatus) and a backend call to allow admin users to manually move an order through its status stages from the Admin Dashboard.

Enhance the MyOrders page and OrderConfirmation page to display real-time order tracking information: current status badge, a visual status timeline (pending → processing → shipped → delivered), estimated stage labels, and a refresh/polling mechanism so status updates appear without a full page reload.

Update the PaymentSuccess page to call the payment confirmation endpoint after Stripe redirects back, update the linked order status to #processing, and display a confirmation summary with the updated order status before redirecting the user to the OrderConfirmation page.

Generate a migration module (migration.mo) that upgrades existing stored order records to include the new status variants and any new fields (e.g., paymentSessionId, statusHistory) added in REQ-1 and REQ-2, defaulting missing fields to safe initial values.
